post.description: Reset another user's password (admin only).
Change password (requires current password).

get.description: List all families with member counts (super admin only).

post.description:
Create a new family (super admin only).

The creating user is automatically added as admin of the new family.

delete.description:
Delete a family and all associated data (super admin only).

Returns 409 if any users would be orphaned (left with no family).

get.description: Get family code for current family (admins only).

post.description: Regenerate family code (admins only).
Request password reset email.
Login with email and password.

Logout current user.

H5: Deletes token from Token table and clears httpOnly cookie.
Send a magic link for password recovery (backwards compat).

get.description:
Get current authenticated user with family context.

H2: This endpoint needs family-loaded user for build_user_response().

post.description: Register with a family code.
Reset password using magic link token.

Initial platform setup - creates super admin and first family.

Only works if no super admins exist.

get.description: Check if initial setup is needed (no super admins exist).

post.description: Switch active family context.

get.description: Get the calendar feed URL for the current family.

schema.title: Response Get Feed Url Api Calendar Feed Url Get

post.description: Regenerate the calendar feed token. Admin only. Old URL stops working.

schema.title: Response Regenerate Feed Token Api Calendar Regenerate Token Post

get.description: Public calendar feed URL. No auth — secured by unique feed token.

get.description: List baby shower updates for an event, chronologically.

get.description: Download a single event as an .ics file.

post.description: Cancel an event (creator or admin only).

get.description: List comments for an event. Pinned comments appear first, then chronological.

post.description: Add a comment to an event. Parses @mentions and fires notifications.

delete.description: Delete own comment. Family admins can delete any comment.

put.description: Edit own comment. Sets edited_at timestamp.

delete.description: Unpin a comment. Only event creator or family admin can unpin.

post.description: Pin a comment. Only event creator or family admin can pin.
Toggle a reaction on a comment. Add if not present, remove if already there.

get.description:
Get anonymous health information for event attendees.

Only returns health info from users who:
1. Have RSVPed 'yes' to this event
2. Have explicitly enabled health info sharing (share_health_info = true)

Information is returned anonymously - no names are attached.
Only event managers (creator or family admins) can access this.

put.description: Reorder photos for an event. Event creator or admin only.

schema.title: Response Reorder Photos Api Events  Event Id  Photos Reorder Put

delete.description: Delete a photo. Uploader or admin can delete.

get.description: Serve a photo file with authentication and family authorization.

get.description: Backwards compatible alias for get_user_wishlist.

Get another user's wishlist.

Only allowed if:
1. You're viewing your own wishlist
2. You're a family admin
3. You're assigned to give a gift to this user (Gift Exchange)
4. Target user is in the same family
